hero.description: iFriend helps parents manage screen time, block harmful content, and create a safe digital environment from one easy-to-use dashboard.

features.description: Manage your child's phone usage easily with powerful tools designed for safety and peace of mind.

ai-ifriend.title: Ai iFriend
ai-ifriend.description: A smart assistant that interacts with the child at times set by the parent. It talks with the child, answers their questions, and provides safe, age-appropriate support.

ai-reports.title: Ai Reports
ai-reports.description: Daily AI-powered reports that give parents clear insights into the child's activity and behavior throughout the day.

bluer.title: Bluer
bluer.description: A smart content protection feature that blocks inappropriate and 18+ content, ensuring a safe and child-friendly digital environment.

pediatric-emergency.title: Pediatric Emergency
pediatric-emergency.description: An advanced safety feature that monitors the child's location and instantly notifies parents if the child leaves the predefined safe area.

product.heading: Powerful Features, Simple Control
product.description: Yes, the app is designed with a simple and user-friendly interface, allowing parents to manage everything easily.

safe-content.title: Safe Content & Apps
safe-content.description: iFriend helps block harmful content and keeps apps age-appropriate.

screen-time.title: Healthy Screen Time
screen-time.description: Set daily limits and schedules to help your kids build healthy screen habits.

calls.title: Calls
calls.description: Always be by your child’s side; instant calls provide the opportunity for pedagogical guidance and psychological support, wherever they may be.

family-location.title: Family Location
family-location.description: Know where your child is and feel reassured wherever they go.

supportAndSafety.description: See how the child app works to protect, guide, and support healthy digital habits.

smart-emotional.title: Smart Emotional Support
smart-emotional.description: iFriend detects negative patterns and helps your child handle stress, bullying, and online pressure.

healthy-routine.title: Healthy Daily Routine
healthy-routine.description: Set daily limits and schedules to help your kids build healthy screen habits.

privacy-safety.title: Privacy & Safety First
privacy-safety.description: Teaches kids how to protect their personal information and avoid unsafe online interactions.

focus-learning.title: Focus & Learning Mode
focus-learning.description: Helps children stay focused during study time and reduce distractions automatically.

balanced-gaming.title: Balanced Gaming
balanced-gaming.description: Keeps gaming fun and healthy with smart limits instead of strict blocks.

online-offline.title: Online & Offline Harmony
online-offline.description: Supports a healthy balance between digital life and real-world activities.

howItWorks.description: Get started in seconds, and let iFriend be your child's digital friend—helping them use their phone safely and in a healthy balance.

download.title: Download App
download.description: Download the app easily and get started in just a few simple steps.

account-type.title: Child or Parent
account-type.description: Choose the account type that fits you: Child or Parent, each with its own features.

link.title: Link With Child
link.description: Connect your account with your child's account to manage and monitor easily.

monitor.title: Monitor Phone Safely
monitor.description: Monitor phone usage safely and help your child develop healthy digital habits.

reviews.heading: Trusted by Parents
reviews.subheading: Real reviews. Real peace of mind.

easy-to-use.question: Is the app easy to use?
easy-to-use.answer: Yes, the app is designed with a simple and user-friendly interface, allowing parents to manage everything easily.

screen-time.question: Can I set screen time limits?
screen-time.answer: Absolutely! You can set daily screen time limits, schedules, and app-specific restrictions for your child's device.

data-safety.question: Is my child's data safe and private?
data-safety.answer: We take privacy seriously. All data is encrypted and we never share your child's information with third parties.

all-devices.question: Does the app work on all devices?
all-devices.answer: iFriend works on Android and iOS devices, making it easy to manage across all your family's smartphones and tablets.

download.heading: Your children's safety starts with a decision
download.description: Download the iFriend app and make mobile use safe and beneficial for your kids.
download.screensAlt: iFriend app screens showing sleep mode and app controls

meta.title: iFriend – Smart Parenting App
meta.description: iFriend helps parents manage screen time, block harmful content, and keep kids safe online.
